Oliver Webb's Webspace Thingy Blog Home

Oliver Webb’s Webspace thingy Welcome! To my Website.

Right now just a thing I hacked together with 18 lines of Makefile to make a rudimentary SSG. with some external scripts that do things like make the article listing.

I’ll probably only post here if I find something interesting or motivating enough to share or write about. The blog is not going to receive daily updates, but is instead for notes or things that are too short or unimportant to write an article about.

I’m a programmer, not a very good writer, and I usually have better stuff to do then write in my free time. So some articles might just be adapted from emails I wrote engaging in technical discussion.

I need to create a better way to manage articles, and a RSS feed generator script sometime soon.

Here’s the article listing:

  • A basic guide on make, and how to make a static site generator using it (April 04, 2024)
